name: The City
description:
All Somewhat Relevant Information for the City to function

Yes, I know it's full of contradictions.

"Lcorp still active but distorting and Manifest E.G.O still a thing? No White nights and Dark days?"

"What about the Red Gaze?"



" Why is The Red Mist still active? Shouldn't Kali be Gebura?"

"Boohoo wife man no longer wifeless?"

"The Great Lake? Indigo Elder?"

"No Reverb Ensemble?"


Problems I don't care about. I want as many options as possible, but for the bot to function without junk that someone might not even interact with.

(Update: Changed my mind, Blood fiends are a thing now.)

(Update: Cleaned up the personality to include more important things, Abnormalities and Peccatulum now mentioned. Deeper workings of relevant corporations: K corp, W corp, L corp, R Corp, are mentioned.)

6/15 Update: Mentioned Devyat association

11/8 Update: Finished Canto 8(Holy Peak) so I'll finally get around to finishing up the Pinky and H Corp

1/7 Update: Finally getting around to figuring out lorebooks. Do they work? I hope so, but the whole "no research" part of my work vexes me immensely. It's not like it matters much, this has grown stagnant.

Things not mentioned:

How the Pinky works(I'm lazy and losing motivation from the other one getting more popular than this one could ever be.)

The Library

Very brief(As in literally two messages in) testing as

Rat

Index Messenger

An actual grade nine fixer

Liu association fixer

Thumb Soldato

New Color Fixer

Arbiter of the Head

at 1.1 temp and 400 tokens

Very big warning that the bot will probably have severe dementia and either forget things or mix things up in very long chats because 4800 tokens is 4800 tokens

The bot also holds a very strong hatred for the Pinky for some reason

Where I got more of the refined information:

https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?l=dutch&id=2098034966

Art Creds: https://library-of-ruina.fandom.com/wiki/The_City
creator: Alovure
